languageStrings.LBL_RECRUITMENT_DESCRIPTION: Configure recruitment process settings, including allowed candidate status transitions.
languageStrings.LBL_STATUS_TRANSITIONS_HELP: Check the transitions that recruiters may perform manually (kanban drag-and-drop and Screening accept/reject). Unchecked pairs are blocked after you save.
languageStrings.LBL_SAVE_TRANSITIONS_FAILED: Could not save status transition rules.
languageStrings.LBL_TRANSITIONS_NOT_CONFIGURED: Transition rules are not active yet. The matrix below shows suggested defaults — review and click Save to enforce them.
